$comment: Overlay of vcpkg 2026.06.24 openvdb + relax-msvc-minimum.patch lowering the MINIMUM_MSVC_VERSION CMake gate from 19.30 to 19.20, so OpenVDB 12 configures with the v142 toolset used by the VS2019 builds.
name: openvdb
description: Sparse volume data structure and tools

ax.description: Provides a powerful and easy way of interacting with OpenVDB volume and point data.

nanovdb.description: A lightweight GPU friendly version of VDB initially targeting rendering applications

nanovdb-tools.description: NanoVDB tools: print, validate, and convert.

tools.description: OpenVDB utilities: view, print and render
